title: Tighten Goo number unit suffix spacing
summary:
Make GooNumber unit suffixes reserve only their rendered suffix width and align numeric text into the suffix so values read like 15% or 12px instead of separated columns. Preserves caller style props and covers suffix width in tests.

Browser check: brush-api first unit number measured textAlign=right, paddingRight=14.26px, unitWidth=1.24em, gapPx=0.01.

Co-authored-by: Miko Meow <101564+mudcube@users.noreply.github.com>
verification: pnpm --dir packages/@goobits/goo exec vitest run src/input/__tests__/GooInput.test.ts
